rule: AI input passed to provider without validation

translations.technical: AI input passed to provider without validation
translations.plain_language_single: Content from your users is sent directly to the AI in {label} without being checked first. Crafted inputs could manipulate the AI's behavior.
translations.plain_language_multi: User content is sent directly to the AI without being checked first in {N} places. Crafted inputs could manipulate the AI's behavior.

education.why_it_matters: AI models process exactly what they're given. If user input goes directly to the AI without being checked, users can craft messages that make the AI behave in unintended ways.
education.what_could_happen: A user writes a "prompt injection" — a cleverly worded message that makes the AI ignore its instructions and do something harmful or embarrassing.
education.what_to_do: Ask your developer to add input validation before user content reaches the AI provider.

business_impact: Unvalidated user content to AI can produce unsafe or off-brand outputs.
consequence: Users may manipulate AI behavior in ways you did not intend.

affected_nodes.detail: AI input passed to provider without validation
affected_nodes.plain_language: Content from your users is sent directly to the AI in generateGeminiWebResponse without being checked first. Crafted inputs could manipulate the AI's behavior.

affected_nodes.detail: AI input passed to provider without validation
affected_nodes.plain_language: Content from your users is sent directly to the AI in generateChatCompletion without being checked first. Crafted inputs could manipulate the AI's behavior.

remediation: Add input validation (e.g. Zod schema.parse) before calling the AI provider.
